card.deleteConfirm: Delete skill "{name}"? It will be detached from every agent. This cannot be undone.

list.title: Skills
list.subtitle: Reusable, text-only review rules. Attach them to agents — each enabled skill is a block in the agent's prompt.
list.emptyBody: A skill is a reusable block of review guidance — text only, no code. Create one, then attach it to any agent.

create.title: Create skill
create.subtitle: A skill is reusable text + configuration. Its body is injected into an agent's prompt — it runs nothing.
create.defaultBody:
## Skill
State directively what the reviewer must do, and when to raise a finding.

fields.name: Name
fields.descriptionHint: The skill's interface — phrase it directively (what it makes the reviewer do).
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Flags any conditional branch with no test that drives execution into it.
fields.bodyHint: Injected verbatim into the agent's prompt under "## Skills / rules". Text + configuration only — a skill runs nothing.

import.title: Import a skill
import.subtitle: Upload a markdown file or a zip archive. We extract the skill's core and preview it.
import.trustNote: Heads up: a foreign skill is foreign instructions in your agent's prompt. Review the body before saving — it is imported DISABLED until you vet and enable it. Executable parts of an archive are never run.
import.parseError: Could not parse the uploaded file.
import.saved: Imported skill "{name}" — disabled until you vet it.

editor.title: Skill
editor.bodyVersionHint: Saving a changed body creates a new immutable version.
editor.versionMessageHint: Saved with the new version and shown in the Versions tab.
editor.loadErrorBody: The skill could not be loaded.

previewTab.promptNote: This is exactly how the skill body lands in an agent's prompt — appended under the shared "## Skills / rules" section, verbatim.

versions.title: Version history
versions.reproHint: Every save snapshots the body so eval runs stay reproducible.
versions.restoreConfirm: Restore v{version}? This saves its body as a new version.
versions.emptyBody: Edit and save the body to record the first version.

stats.usedBy: {count, plural, one {agent uses this skill} other {agents use this skill}}
stats.emptyBody: Open an agent's Skills tab to attach this skill — then it appears here.
